scripts.db:generate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 drizzle-kit generate'
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 drizzle-kit migrate'
scripts.db:studio: dotenv -e apps/api/.env -- sh -c 'cd packages/database && NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 drizzle-kit studio'
